wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.benefitBookOneTapText: Pay for sessions from your balance without entering card details every time.
wallet.benefitFasterCheckoutText: Instant sessions confirm quicker when your wallet has enough funds.
wallet.benefitSecureSpendingText: A 6-digit PIN protects larger payments and withdrawals.
wallet.benefitClearHistoryText: See every top-up and payment in your activity feed.

cards.title: Payment methods

autoTopUp.title: Auto top-up
autoTopUp.intro: Avoid running out mid-session. We'll top up your wallet automatically when it dips below your threshold.
autoTopUp.methodHint: Manage cards from the wallet settings
autoTopUp.noMethodHint: Add one from the wallet settings to enable auto top-up.
autoTopUp.invalidThresholdBody: Enter a threshold amount greater than zero.
autoTopUp.invalidReloadBody: Enter a reload amount greater than zero.
autoTopUp.reloadBelowThresholdBody: Set the reload higher than the threshold — otherwise the wallet would re-trigger immediately.
autoTopUp.savedBody: Your wallet will reload automatically when it drops below the threshold.

support.heroSub: Have a question about booking, sessions, payments, or your account? Our support team typically replies within one business day (Mon–Fri).
support.tipsBody:
• Instant sessions: both sides must tap Join within 2 minutes.
• Scheduled sessions: use the in-app timer Start when both are connected.
• Refunds or session issues: use Report a technical issue below and pick the session.
support.altTitle: Report a Technical issue / Request a refund
support.altSub: Pick a session and tell us what went wrong.
support.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your question or issue in detail...
support.requiredBody: Please fill in both subject and description.
support.sentBody: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you soon.
support.sendFailed: Failed to send message. Please try again.
support.autoReply: Thanks — we've got your message. A team-member will follow up soon. Need anything else?
support.openReportA11y: Open Report a problem to send diagnostics

about.description: NetQwix connects athletes and learners with world-class experts for live, personalized training sessions. Whether you are an aspiring professional or a dedicated enthusiast, NetQwix brings expert guidance to your screen.
about.howItWorksBody:
1. Enthusiasts book instant or scheduled sessions with verified experts.
2. Both join the native video room — review videos, draw, and record progress.
3. Experts deliver game plans and feedback stored in your locker.
about.missionText: To democratize access to expert coaching by making world-class guidance available to everyone, everywhere — through technology that feels as natural as being in the same room as your expert.

liveVideo.title: Live Video Sessions
liveVideo.desc: HD video calls with screen sharing for immersive coaching experiences.

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.desc: Flexible booking system — schedule instant or recurring sessions.

clips.title: Video Sharing
clips.desc: Upload, share, and review training videos directly in the platform.

community.title: Community
community.desc: Connect with experts and learners across every sport and skill.

payments.title: Secure Payments
payments.desc: Transparent pricing and secure transactions via Stripe.

progress.title: Track Progress
progress.desc: Session reports and ratings to measure and showcase improvement.

sessions.cancelBookingBody: Your expert has not confirmed yet. Cancelling now releases the escrow hold and starts a full refund to your original payment method. Refunds usually appear within 5–10 business days.
sessions.cancelBookingPolicy: You can cancel while your expert has not confirmed. A full refund is issued automatically.
sessions.cancelBookingSuccessBody: Your refund has been initiated. You can track it in Wallet → Activity.
sessions.offlineCancelBody: You're offline — we'll cancel this booking when you're back online.

sessions.earlyEndSuccessTrainer: You're available to book again for the remaining time in this slot.
sessions.earlyEndSuccessTrainee: Thanks for confirming. Your expert is available again for the rest of this time slot.

community.headerSub: Connect with trainers and trainees. Tap Add to send a friend request.

bookExpert.searchMinHint: Enter at least 2 characters to narrow search.
bookExpert.emptyDescription: Try adjusting categories, price, or rating in Filters.

bookExpert.compareLimitBody: You can compare up to {{max}} experts at a time. Remove one to pin a new pick.

dashboard.notAvailableTraineeOnly: This section is only available for trainee accounts.

trainerPromo.lead: Create codes trainees can use when booking you. The discount is taken from your session earnings, not NetQwix commission.
trainerPromo.fundingNote: Expert promos only work on your sessions. Enthusiasts see your code at checkout.
trainerPromo.empty: No promo codes yet. Create one to share with your community.

errors.title: Promo code
errors.codeLength: Code must be at least 4 characters.
errors.discount: Enter a discount greater than zero.
errors.dates: Start and end dates are required.
errors.endAfterStart: End date must be after start date.

schedule.title: Sessions
schedule.noWeeklySlotsDescription: Tap 'Edit schedule' to set your weekly availability.

blockList.title: Blocked accounts
blockList.explainer: Blocked accounts can't message you, see your online status, or find your profile. Unblocking lifts those restrictions but does not restore deleted conversations.
blockList.unblockConfirmBody: They'll be able to message you and see your profile again. You can block them later if needed.
blockList.emptyBody: If you ever need to block someone, open their profile or a chat and pick "Block".

dataExport.title: Export my data
dataExport.lead: Get a copy of the data NetQwix holds about you. Required under GDPR (EU/UK) and India's DPDP Act, useful when moving accounts or auditing your information.
dataExport.includedChats: Chat messages you sent or received (decrypted where possible).
dataExport.includedClips: Video metadata (titles, sports, timestamps). Raw videos are linked, not bundled, to keep the archive small.
dataExport.confirmBody: We'll bundle your profile, bookings, chat messages, videos metadata, and wallet activity into a ZIP archive and email you a download link.
dataExport.requestedBody: We'll email you a download link as soon as your archive is ready. Most exports finish within 48 hours.
dataExport.helpFooter: Questions about what's exported or want a partial copy? Contact support from Settings → Contact us.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.intro: Add an extra OTP step for trainer accounts so a leaked password alone can't unlock your business profile and payouts.
twoFactor.trustDevice: Trust this device for 30 days. New devices will still need a fresh code.
twoFactor.codeShortBody: The verification code is six digits long.
twoFactor.enabledBody: We'll ask for a code the next time you sign in on a new device.
twoFactor.verifyErrorBody: Double-check the code and try again.
twoFactor.disableConfirmBody: Your account will rely on password / biometric login alone. You can turn it back on at any time.
twoFactor.noDevicesBody: Devices you tick "remember" on during sign-in show up here so you can revoke them anytime.
twoFactor.revokeConfirmBody: Sign-ins from this device will need to enter a code again.

verified.title: Verified trainer
verified.summary: NetQwix manually reviewed this trainer's identity, credentials, and contact details before granting the badge.
verified.bulletIdentity: Government-issued ID confirmed against the trainer's profile.
verified.bulletCredentials: Certifications, work history, and education claims were reviewed for authenticity.
verified.bulletContact: Email and phone number confirmed via one-time codes.
verified.disclaimer: Verification confirms identity and stated credentials. It does not guarantee outcomes or substitute for your own due diligence.
verified.accessibility: Verified trainer — tap to learn what verification means

welcome.title: Welcome to NetQwix
welcome.body: Your all-in-one platform for live, personalised coaching. Swipe to take the quick tour.

locker.title: Your Locker
locker.body: Home base for videos, uploads, saved sessions and progress — everything you've worked on, one tap away.

book.title: Book a Session
book.body: Browse trainers, view ratings, and book a scheduled session at a time that fits your week.

instant.title: Instant Sessions
instant.body: See who's online right now, choose your duration, pay, and connect in seconds.

chat.title: Chat & Community
chat.body: Message friends, share videos, and build your network — react, reply, schedule, and forward without leaving the chat.

notify.title: Stay Notified
notify.body: Real-time pings for bookings, messages, friend requests, and 5-minute session reminders.

ready.title: You're All Set
ready.body: Explore the app, book your first session, and start your journey. We're glad to have you on NetQwix.

dashboardSessions.title: Track your sessions here
dashboardSessions.description: Tap to see upcoming, active, and past sessions all in one place.

dashboardChats.title: Message trainers and friends
dashboardChats.description: Chats live in the bottom tab — and this shortcut takes you straight there.

chatsFab.title: Start your first chat
chatsFab.description: Tap here to pick a friend or trainer and start a 1-on-1 or group chat.

scheduleEdit.title: Publish your availability
scheduleEdit.description: Add weekly slots so trainees can book you. Empty calendars don't show up in browse.

profileCompletion.title: Profile {{pct}}% complete
profileCompletion.pillA11y: Profile is {{pct}} percent complete. Tap to see what's missing.
profileCompletion.sheetDescription: Each step boosts how trainees and trainers see you on NetQwix.
profileCompletion.snoozeA11y: Hide this pill for two weeks

profile_picture.label: Add a profile picture
profile_picture.hint: Profiles with photos get 3× more bookings.

full_name.label: Confirm your name
full_name.hint: Make sure your full name is set so others recognise you.

bio.label: Write a bio
bio.hint: A short bio helps trainees understand your style before booking.

phone.label: Verify your phone
phone.hint: Helps us reach you for booking confirmations and OTP.

timezone.label: Set your timezone
timezone.hint: We use this to show every session in your local time.

language.label: Pick your app language
language.hint: Switch between English, Hindi, Spanish and more.

sport.label: Pick your primary sport
sport.hint: Enthusiasts filter by sport when browsing — this unlocks discovery.

hourly_rate.label: Set your hourly rate
hourly_rate.hint: Required before you can accept paid bookings.

certifications.label: Add a certification or credential
certifications.hint: Verified credentials build trust and unlock the badge sooner.

availability.label: Publish your weekly availability
availability.hint: Empty calendars mean zero bookings. Add at least one slot.

favorite_sport.label: Tell us your sport
favorite_sport.hint: We use this to recommend trainers and videos.

interests.label: Favourite a few trainers
interests.hint: Save experts you like — they appear instantly on your home.

preClass.title: Your session starts soon
preClass.description: Starts in about {{minutes}} min. Quick checklist to make this a smooth one.
preClass.cameraHint: Open the device camera to confirm it's working and well-lit.
preClass.micHint: Say a few words — make sure permissions are granted.
preClass.quietHint: Close the door, mute notifications, use headphones if you can.
preClass.waterHint: Hydration helps focus, especially for movement sessions.
preClass.networkHint: Move closer to the router or switch off other downloads.

precall.title: Ready when you are
precall.subtitle: Check your camera, mic and connection before joining.
precall.permissionDenied: Camera or microphone permission denied. Update in Settings.
precall.micHintOn: System mic is active and ready.
precall.netDetailUnknown: Tap retry to test your connection.
precall.blurSub: Soft-blur whatever is behind you (best effort).

traineeNote.editorSubtitle: Only you can see this. Use it for goals, injuries, or context about {{name}}.
traineeNote.placeholder: e.g. Knee injury — avoid jumps. Targeting May 5k race.
traineeNote.deleteConfirmBody: This will permanently delete your private note about this trainee.

trainerNudge.title: Send a nudge
trainerNudge.subtitle: Re-engage {{name}} with a templated message.
trainerNudge.tplComebackSub: "Haven't seen you in a while — let's pick a session."
trainerNudge.tplPromoSub: "I'm holding slots this week — want me to lock one in?"
trainerNudge.customPlaceholder: Skip to send the template, or type your own message.
trainerNudge.successBody: Your message landed in the chat and as a push notification.

trainerSchedule.painterTip: Drag across cells to paint multiple blocks at once. Tap one cell to flip just that 30-minute slot.

tips.heading: Tips for you
tips.loadError: Could not load tips. Tap to try again.

postSessionRating.title: Rate your session
postSessionRating.body: How was your session with {{name}}? It only takes a moment.
postSessionRating.modalSub: Your feedback helps us improve every session.
postSessionRating.alertStarsBody: Choose stars for session and audio/video.
postSessionRating.alertRecommend: Tell us whether you'd recommend your expert.
postSessionRating.alertDetailsBody: Please include a title and short remark.

continueBooking.title: Finish your booking
continueBooking.bodyInstant: You were booking an instant session with {{name}}.
continueBooking.bodySchedule: You were scheduling with {{name}} before signing in.

commission.body: NetQwix charges a small platform commission (usually 15%) on each booking. The amounts you see in this card are your earnings after commission and refunds. Payouts move to your bank or Stripe account on the platform schedule.

hourlyRate.body: Charge per booked hour. NetQwix takes a platform commission (typically 15%) and the rest is your earnings. Set this where your bookings are competitive — you can update it any time and existing bookings keep their original price.

slotLength.body: Enthusiasts see your weekly slots in their own timezone. Each block is the duration of one bookable session — keep it consistent so bookings don't overlap. Update the timezone if you travel so the slots line up with your local hours.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.subtitle: Powered by NetQwix AI
ai.label: AI Assistant
ai.connectError: I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please try again in a moment.
ai.clearBody: Removes the saved history on this device.

suggest.findYoga: Find a yoga trainer near me
suggest.improveGame: How can I improve my game?

voice.permissionBody: Allow microphone access in Settings to use voice input.
voice.transcribeBody: Voice transcription isn't available right now. Please type your message instead.
